name: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration
description: Classic password expiration lure spoofing Microsoft 365 with generic greeting and urgency.
subject: Action Required: Your Password Expires Today
text:
Dear User,

Your Microsoft 365 password will expire today. To continue using your email and files without interruption, you must verify and keep your current password now.

Keep Current Password: {{.URL}}

If you do not act, your account will be locked and all email delivery will stop.

Thank you,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
html:
Microsoft 365

Dear User,

Your Microsoft 365 password expires today. To avoid losing access to your email and files, verify your current password immediately.

Keep Current Password

If you ignore this message your account will be locked.

Microsoft 365 Security Team
{{.Tracker}}

name: Okta MFA Reset Required
description: Spoofed Okta email asking the user to re-enroll their MFA device.
subject: Okta: MFA Re-enrollment Required for {{.Email}}
html:
okta

MFA Re-enrollment Required

Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of our scheduled security maintenance, all Okta users must re-enroll their multi-factor authentication device.

Account: {{.Email}}
Deadline: {{.Date}}

Re-enroll MFA Device

Failure to complete re-enrollment before the deadline will result in temporary account suspension.

Okta Identity Team • This is an automated notification
{{.Tracker}}

name: Google Workspace Storage Full
description: Google Workspace storage quota warning that drives the user to a fake login page.
subject: Your Google Workspace storage is 98% full
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your Google Workspace account is almost full. Once you reach your quota, you will not be able to send or receive email.

Current usage: 14.7 GB / 15 GB (98%)

Free up space or upgrade: {{.URL}}

Thanks,
The Google Workspace Team
html:
Google Workspace

Your storage is almost full

Hi {{.FirstName}}, your Google Workspace account is 98% full. Once you reach 100%, you won't be able to send or receive email.

Current usage
14.7 GB of 15 GB

Manage storage

{{.Tracker}}

name: Apple ID Has Been Locked
description: Classic Apple ID lockout notification for consumer account compromise simulation.
subject: Your Apple ID has been locked for security reasons
text:
Dear Customer,

We have locked your Apple ID because we detected unusual sign-in activity from a new device.

Location: Moscow, Russia
Device: Unknown Windows PC
Time: {{.Date}}

To unlock your account, please verify your identity:
{{.URL}}

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your Apple ID will be permanently disabled.

Apple Support
html:


Apple ID Locked

Dear Customer,

We have locked your Apple ID because we detected unusual sign-in activity from a new device.

Location: Moscow, Russia
Device: Unknown Windows PC
Time: {{.Date}}

Verify Identity

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your Apple ID will be permanently disabled.

Apple Support
{{.Tracker}}

name: LinkedIn Unread Messages
description: LinkedIn new message notification impersonation used to steal LinkedIn credentials.
subject: You have 3 unread messages on LinkedIn
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

You have 3 unread messages on LinkedIn from people in your network.

- Sarah Johnson (Recruiter at TechCorp): "Interested in a new opportunity?"
- David Chen: Connection request accepted
- LinkedIn InMail from hiring manager

Read your messages: {{.URL}}

LinkedIn Corporation

Linkedin

Hi {{.FirstName}}, you have 3 new messages

Sarah Johnson
Recruiter at TechCorp
"Interested in a new opportunity?"
David Chen
Connection request accepted
LinkedIn InMail
From hiring manager

Read Messages

name: Salesforce Session Expired - Verify Access
description: Professional Salesforce session expiry email targeted at sales staff with realistic branding.
subject: Action needed: Your Salesforce session has expired
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your Salesforce session has expired. This happens automatically every 90 days as part of our security policy.

To continue accessing your pipeline, opportunities, and reports, please verify your account:

{{.URL}}

If you do not verify within 72 hours, your access to the {{.OrgName}} Salesforce instance will be suspended and your sales manager will be notified.

Thank you for helping keep {{.OrgName}} data secure.

The Salesforce Team

---
This message was sent to {{.Email}}. Salesforce.com, Inc. 415 Mission Street, 3rd Floor, San Francisco CA 94105
html:
salesforce

Your session has expired

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your Salesforce session has expired. This happens automatically every 90 days as part of our security policy.

To continue accessing your pipeline, opportunities, and reports, please verify your account:

Verify My Account

Important: If you do not verify within 72 hours, your access to the {{.OrgName}} Salesforce instance will be suspended and your sales manager will be notified.

Thank you for helping keep {{.OrgName}} data secure.
The Salesforce Team

Salesforce.com, Inc. 415 Mission Street, 3rd Floor, San Francisco CA 94105
{{.Tracker}}

name: PayPal Unusual Activity Alert
description: Classic PayPal account restriction notice used to harvest consumer banking credentials.
subject: We noticed unusual activity on your PayPal account
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

We noticed some unusual activity on your PayPal account and have temporarily limited some functionality.

What happened?
Our system detected a login attempt from an unrecognized device in another country.

What you need to do:
Log in to confirm your identity and lift the restriction:
{{.URL}}

If you do not confirm within 48 hours, your account will be permanently limited.

Thank you,
PayPal Security
html:
PayPal

Unusual activity detected

Dear {{.FirstName}},

We noticed some unusual activity on your PayPal account and have temporarily limited some functionality.

What happened?

Our system detected a login attempt from an unrecognized device in another country.

What you need to do

Log in to confirm your identity and lift the restriction:

Log In to PayPal

If you do not confirm within 48 hours, your account will be permanently limited.

Copyright 1999-2026 PayPal. All rights reserved.
{{.Tracker}}

name: Azure Conditional Access Policy Update
description: Sophisticated Azure conditional access notification targeted at enterprise users.
subject: {{.OrgName}} Azure AD: Conditional access re-authentication required
text:
{{.FirstName}},

As part of a conditional access policy update for {{.OrgName}}, all users must re-authenticate with their corporate credentials to maintain access to:

- Microsoft Teams
- SharePoint Online
- Outlook Web Access
- OneDrive for Business

Policy reference: CA-2026-0409-ORG
Applied by: {{.OrgName}} IT Administration
Deadline: 24 hours

Re-authenticate: {{.URL}}

Do not reply to this message. It is an automated notification from Azure Active Directory.

© Microsoft Corporation
